transcript.text:
(The hearty eater of thunder)
(The God of Mukbang, Mukthor)
(An outlaw with Cat-finity Gauntlet)
(A chicken villain, Catnos)
(A grand battle is awaiting)
(An overwhelming battle of power)
(And at the end of this war awaits...)
(Nachos?!)
(This chicken has been secured through a brutal battle)
(We want to find out what this is...!)
(Let's check it out right away)
Hey guys!
I'm here to
(Yay, chicken!) have this chicken right here
This place is known for "Map-chelin Chicken"
But this time,

(The birthplace of Map-chelin released a new menu!) they released a new menu, so I'm here to try it out!
(Chicken with a Mexican vibe...?) I heard it has a Mexican vibe! I'm curious
FYI - They offer safe and healthy chicken
so you can enjoy their chicken worry-free
Let's check it out!
(Located in Gasan-dong, Seoul)
(This place offers)
(Korea's first)
("animal welfare" chicken)
("Jadam Chicken")
(Entered) Thank you!
(Full of compliments) She's gorgeous! You should go on-screen
No way haha
What does "Jadam" mean?
(A better chicken that comes from nature) Chicken with nature
(A better chicken that comes from nature) Oh, I see

You see,
I failed all of my businesses
(Good chicken) except for this "Jadam Chicken"!
(We came all this way for today's meeting...) Seems like I've worked this hard to meet Ms. Tzuyang
Our Gasan branch
(Rated 3 stars for hygiene)
- focuses the most on hygiene!
Oh, this is the new menu?
(Chicken with rich Mexican aroma, Boneless Tikitako Chicken) Oh, avocado! Cool!
- It's our new menu! It's good! - I see! In that case,
I'll get 3 orders of the new Tikitako Chicken
(Can't leave out Map-chelin) And the signature menu, Map-chelin
(Map-chelin x1) Medium spiciness
- Medium spiciness - Okay
(Various side menus other than chicken dishes) There's also Soboro Chicken!
I'll grab this 6-piece Soboro Chicken one

Excuse me
I'm not a smart man
(Too many...) So I gotta write this down!
(Boneless Tikitako Chicken x3, Map-chelin Chicken)
(Joa Tteokbokki) Crunchy Potato Fries, Mozza Gamzza
I'll have these
The one who made Map-chelin
(The Father of Map-chelin, Team Leader of Chicken Development team) Oh really? Hello!
Then, you made the Tikitaka(?) as well?
(Got the name wrong) Right
(Got the name wrong) Oh, really?
Tikitako!
(I'm okay) I'm sorry
(Our father will cook it himself!) Wow, thank you!
(Here comes the unprecedented chicken that)
(the team leader will cook himself!)

(With a freshly-cooked fried chicken,)
(tomato sauce to boost refreshingness,)
(and even guacamole and sour cream on top of it?)
(It's a recipe that no one has ever thought of!)
(Boneless Tikitako Chicken that came from Mexico)
(One of the steady-sellers of "Jadam Chicken")
(A chicken with an astringent kick, Map-chelin chicken)
(Here comes the tteokbokki we can't leave out)
(along with crispy side menus!)
(Here comes the chicken) Oh, this is the new menu!
(Boneless Tikitako Chicken) Thank you
(Here comes a table full of) Thank you
(chicken menus that appear one-by-one) Look at all that portion! Wow
I'm sure you can't...
finish all of it! We can pack any leftovers!
(You will find out in a bit...) Take your time

(You will find out in a bit...) Thank you!
I guess this is the new menu
It does have that
(At a glance, it does look like a taco!) Mexican taco vibe to it!
And this is the Map-chelin Chicken!
Thanks for the meal!
(What in the world is this...?) What's this? Haha
Pick 1 out of 3 for us
(3 tools appeared out of the blue...) Out of the 3?
(3 tools appeared out of the blue...) Yes
Well, you see...
(What's this for...?)
(Decided) That one...
(Picked Mjölnir, the tougest-looking one) This one... Ooh, it's light!
What's this?
We use this hammer to crush the nachos

(A chicken with crushed nacho chips...?) and sprinkle it on the new Tikitako Chicken!
Does that mean you give this?
Well, no!
We were going to, but...
(Back-breaking expenses) It's rather pricey, so we can't give you one
(Mjölnir shall be bestowed upon the chosen one only) But we'll give it to you, Ms. Tzuyang
(Mjölnir shall be bestowed upon the chosen one only) Thank you! I use this?
Crush it with the hammer first
Next, step on it with
bear paws
And use the magic wand!
(Magician full of strength) To crush it!
(Planning on crushing things(?) using various methods) I see, thank you
So, I got this hammer
out of the blue
(A unique menu with crushed nachos) You're supposed to crush the nachos with this

(Are we in Mexico, the home of tacos?) Sounds like that'll give an even more Mexican vibe!
(Receiving the grace of the God of Thunder...)
(Bam) Hiya! Wait, haha
(Is this how you're supposed to do it?) Wow, it works wonders!
(Even crushed her hand...) Ouch!
(Tada)
Nachos!
It's-
It's a bag per
(Finally completed the Mexican visual) order of chicken! Look at that visual
Thanks for the meal!
Let's dig in
(Tikitako only comes boneless) So it's only available boneless like this
The sauce tastes-
I've never
(There has never been a chicken like this...) a chicken that tasted like this

I'm seriously feeling that Mexican vibe
It's like taco!
It has the tomato chili
and guacamole aroma
What's that?
(Offered nachos to try with the sauce) Dip the chicken in the nacho sauce...
Then, I should
dip this here
Now that I've crushed
these nachos,
(Boosted crispiness thanks to the crispy batter) it feels like a very crispy batter
It's so crispy thanks to the nachos
And the chicken is very tender
("Jadam Chicken" only uses domestic chickens) They used 100% domestic chicken for it
Gotta have chicken thighs for boneless chicken
I won't be fed up with these

(Sour) It's a bit sour
(Refreshing) and refreshing
(Flavorful) and very flavorful!
(Can't get fed up thanks to 3 different sauces) So you can enjoy them a lot
(Their... cubed radishes seem different...)
The cubed radishes
(Free of glacial acetic acid and saccharin) are made with natural ingredients!
(Pickled cubed radishes made with natural ingredients) They didn't use glacial acetic acid
And they
offer
healthy, well-being chicken
as they use 20 different nuts & grain powder mix for the batter,
making it extra healthy
This is!
You know that classic, roasted chicken?
It's like a biscuit!

It'll taste good in this sauce
This side has a lot of guacamole on it
Good!
I heard this is slightly spicy
The guacamole sauce is a bit spicey
The spiciness really washes the greasiness for you
Are these nachos
seasoned?
These alone taste good
I really like their fries here
(The Crunchy Potato Fries lives up to its name...) So crunchy
It's almost like
The outside
is almost hard
It's so crunchy
Powder

Nacho powder
(Extra crispiness) Let's top that
This is
This is the Chiyoring Cheese Ball
It's coated full of
(Full of cheese powder) Is Chiyoring the cheese seasoning?
This is super crispy!
Tteokbokki!
(You feel missing out without this goodie) It looks good too!
The rice cake is plump!
(CLEARED one plate)
This is "Jadam Chicken"'s signature menu
("Jadam Chicken"'s Pride - Map-chelin Chicken) It's a popular chicken dish that almost everyone has heard of
I'm already drooling!
(It's slightly astringent and spicy for spicy lightweights!) I've become a spicy lightweight
(Cheese bomb)

I thought it would be like
a whole mozzarella cheese inside a potato corn dog
But it's not!
I taste rich potato
Wow, this is so spicy!
(The Map-chelin lives up to its name...) I had a half of cheese ball and this one for this single piece of chicken
(Found something)
Oh, I crush it with that now...
(Meow) Will these soft paws crush it though?
Oh, you're crushing it for me?
(Adorable) It's a fan service of sorts
(Hey, this is what you call cuteness!)
(Life sure is tough...)
(Boom)
(Seems as if he's mad at the nachos) I want these gloves
(Nacho pancake) It's a pancake haha

(Down goes the nachos full of ownder's love(?)) I wanted to try it as it is too! I'll only sprinkle on the half of it
This tastes good as it is
You could also have it with a big nacho
Wow, this one's full of sauce
It certainly feels different as it's handmade
The radishes are much softer
Since it has a taco-like vibe to it,
I think you can slice them thinly and put it in a tortilla
I'm shocked...
She's amazing...
- How's the food? - Sorry?
It's so good
I'm enjoying them!
(Even the owner still enjoys the Tikitako chicken) It's so good for me too that I'm still having it
It's so good
Oh, the sauce

(You're right)
(Here's come an explanation) This tastes good because
one of our staff has
(So much pressure) the Hand of Midas
(His hands create the new menus) He gives everything he's got for new menus
If the Map-chelin is a bit spicy for you,
we can pack it for you! And we'll tell you how you can enjoy Tikitako Chicken
With tortilla...
Oh my...
(I guess I'm a pro foodie) I did think about that before
- I thought it would be nice to have a tortilla for it - And nachos too!
(Super excited) Sounds yummy! Great
I saved a cheese ball! Let's have it
How did they make the outside so crispy?
(Here comes the tortilla) Oh, thank you!
(Joined) Sit!

Wow, do you also have tortilla available?
(Nope) It's not for sale
(But let me tell you how you can pair it) But I wanted to tell you another way to enjoy it
And you were the development...?
(King) Team Leader
(The Father of Map-chelin) Oh, the leader!
- And you came up with the new menu too, right? - Right
Map-chelin was
(It's good but I can't have a lot of spicy food) so good but spicy so I packed it
What kind of sauce is this?
(The secret lies in the mayonnaise) Mayonnaise is the base
(The secret lies in the mayonnaise) Oh, mayo!
I blended sweetness and spiciness together
LA is known for tacos
I've tried a lot there
and thought it would be a nice collaboration with our chicken...

(Tikitako's 3 different sauces that you won't be sick of) The sauces are rather harmonious!
So, Mexico is
(Team Leader's chicken hacks - Tikitako Burrito!) known for their tacos and burritos
(Tikitako comes in) Thank you
We need some nachos!
Will you crush it for us?
(I just can't...)
This is an ace up the sleeve...
(Come on)
Could our...
(Got you) leader do it for...
(What?) Me? This?
(You're now the leader of the Magician Team) A pretty person should be using this
(Failed)
I mean, who came up with this idea?
(Was it you?)

There's a ring too!
(Adorable)
(Transformed)
- You can crush it into big pieces! - Oh, okay
(Brutal princess) Like this?
(Big nacho pieces) Big?
(Boom boom pow)
(Reality check) Why are we doing this? Haha
(But she does what others ask her to do)
(Tada) It looks good
(Tada) Yes! It's done
(Tikitako hacks: 1. Evenly spread the mustard)
(2. Top crushed nachos as much as you want)
(3. Slice and top Boneless Tikitako Chicken)
(Roll it to complete your Tikitako burrito!) Wow, looks good!
(Tada) Thank you!

Thanks for the burrito!
This is honestly so good!
(Packed with chicken)
This seriously
tastes completely different!
(Yummy Tikitako burrito with crispiness) The chips replace the rice
- It has a nice texture - Right, it has a much better texture
(A new discovery of nacho chips) I like how it's unique since you add chips instead of rice
I realized I could make around
12 to 13 burritos
with one Tikitako chicken!
(Love it)
Would you like one more?
Yes!
(If you want an even more unique recipe,)
(try this burrito recipe out with a tortilla wrap!)

Thanks for making such a yummy chicken dish
The burrito is so good too!
(Couldn't thank you enough) Thank you
After finishing this, I should make one as well
I did think it'll go well with a tortilla
It a perfect duo!
(Tzuyang tries to make a tortilla herself!) Adding all of these sounds good
What if this looks even more appetizing?
Mmm, this is good too!
This is good too
Is it about time that I sprinkle this?
(Topping)
(Loading the final bite with a burrito...!) Looks good!
The cheese ball tastes like a typical cheese ball but it's good!
It's familiar, but surprises you when you have it
(Destroyed...) Oh my gosh...

What's wrong with this?
(Our lady is sad of ruining the finale...)
(Gathering)
I'll have it like this!
(Done)
(That works...?) She's amazing
(Both of them are confused witnessing the scene in-person) I was surprised when I watched the videos
but I'm even more surprised in person
- Did you enjoy the chicken? - Yes, I loved all of them!
We're holding a "Show us the receipt" event to celebrate the release of Tikitako Chicken
- Oh, is it this? - Right
(The so-called "Let's leave to Cancun, the heaven on earth!") Cancun, the heaven on earth?
Oh, you get to go to Mexico since it's Mexican chicken...
If you enter a draw on "Jadam Chicken"'s official website with your receipt,
(You can enter the draw as much as you want) you can enter a draw per every receipt
Oh, so you can enter the draw multiple times as you order more?

(Various prizes awaits you other than the travel voucher!) They got laptops! Laptop, robot vacuum
(A phenomenal chicken dish) I tried their new Tikitako chicken
(It felt even more special as it was so good) Not only it was unique, it's also yummy
(Super satisfied) I loved it
(Owner's children are here to watch her) Tzuyang
- Tzu...yang - What?
(Entering command) Tzuyang
(Entering command) Tzu... Tzuyang!
- And mukddang(?) - Mukddang?
(Revising) No, mukbang!
(Revising) Mukbang!
(The eldest) Get your pronunciation right
I watched the all-you-can-eat video a lot
You're so pretty!
What? Haha
- He said you're so pretty! - Wow, really?

It's an honor to meet you!
(They're so mature)
So pretty!
(Very polite) She's very pretty...
Mukddang...
- Mukzzang... - Mukbang...
(Oh my...)
How was Tikitako?
I honestly enjoyed it so much!
(Owner mode) Thank you
How old are you?
- I'm in Grade 3... - You're 9? Grade 3?
(Come on, step out of it)
(You're only in Grade 6...?) I'm in Grade 6...
(You're only in Grade 6...?) Really?
Daddy's name

His name is...
Lee-kyung...
(Do not say that) That's a secret
(Why my name tho?)
(Entertained / Innocent / Worried) Hahaha
As always,
- I had a great meal! - As always, I had a great meal!
